title: pavonia rupestris
intro: Pavonia rupestris, also known as Rock Rose or Rockmallow, is a flowering plant species belonging to the family Malvaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Pavonia rupestris include treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or internally, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
